Off Calendar Feb-14-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
David Commins, Esq., of Commins & Knudsen, PC, Tel. 415.391.6490, appearing for Plaintiff and moving party.

No other appearance. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER RBC WEALTH MANAGEMENT, A DIVISION OF RBC CAPITAL MARKETS, LLC's Re-Noticed Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award is Granted. No opposition filed and good cause shown. Order and Judgment signed in open Court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported
